title: AI Jump Coach — Rider Pose Analyzer
tagline: Upload a show-jumping clip and the AI flags position faults frame by frame.
upload_label: Upload a jump video (MP4 or MOV)
synthetic_notice: The in-browser pose model could not be loaded; a demo keypoint generator was used to exercise the flow.
no_faults: No position faults were detected in this jump.
need_login: Log in on the panel to analyze (1 credit per analysis).
fault_left_behind: Left behind (torso lags after the apex)
fault_dropped_rein: Dropped rein hand (wrist below elbow on the ascent)
fault_gaze_drop: Premature gaze drop (head drops before the apex)
fault_forward_seat: Forward seat at landing (hip ahead of ankle)
privacy_body: The video you upload is processed only to analyze rider position. Pose processing happens in your browser; only the joint keypoints and analysis metadata are sent to the server, never the video itself. We do not share your video or data with third parties. If Latin American scope is later confirmed, this service will align with Ley 1581 de 2012 (Colombia) and the LGPD (Brazil).
jc_lede: Upload a video of your jump and the AI flags every position fault against the fence apex, frame by frame.
jc_dz_title: Drag a file or click to choose
jc_dz_sub: Processed on your device. Max 500 MB.
